case_title: FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION vs. CASTELLANOS, ADRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE BENSON, KBAUER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTED, ON THE RECORD, PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE (SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM TO RIGHT OF POSSESSON) SERVED ON ALL OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION BY SERVING ADRIAN CASELLANOS ON 9-11-95 FILED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTELLANOS, ADRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 333 LELAND AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-24-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE ALL OCCUPANTS AND CLAIMANTS IN POSSESSION. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
